channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Major Decline in Indian Stock Markets: Key Factors Behind Sensex and Nifty Fall
item.description: On a turbulent trading day, Indian stock markets witnessed significant losses, with Sensex dropping by approximately 1,300 points and Nifty falling by 420 points. Analysts attribute this sharp decline...

item.title: Gun violence should be treated as a public health crisis in South Africa
item.description: Every day in South Africa, around 30 people are shot dead and another 43 survive gunshot wounds, equating to more than one shooting every 20 minutes. The article highlights the broader impact beyond d...

item.title: AI Restores Bobby Rush's Voice for Jesse Jackson Jr. Endorsement Ad
item.description: Former longtime Chicago Congressman Bobby Rush, whose vocal cords were damaged by throat cancer, appears in a new campaign ad endorsing Jesse Jackson Jr.'s bid to reclaim the 2nd Congressional Distric...

item.title: The History of Nuclear Weapons in Africa and the Continent’s Nuclear-Free Commitment
item.description: Africa was once home to nuclear weapons, albeit briefly, with South Africa under the apartheid regime being the only country on the continent to have developed six air-deliverable nuclear bombs betwee...

item.title: Key Events and Updates in Australian Politics This Week
item.description: This week in Australian politics, parliament is sitting from Tuesday to Thursday, with key issues expected to include the evacuation of Australians stranded in the Middle East amid the ongoing US-Isra...

item.title: Amaechi Accuses Tinubu of Being Scared of ADC, Challenges APC to Fair 2027 Contest

item.title: How Alexander Graham Bell Made the First Telephone Call
item.description: On 10 March 1876, Alexander Graham Bell spoke the first intelligible words transmitted electrically: 'Mr Watson, come here. I want to see you.' Bell, a Scottish-born professor at Boston University, ha...

item.title: Senator Hontiveros raises concern over PSA delay on Joseph Sy birth certificate cancellation
item.description: Senator Risa Hontiveros raised concerns on Monday regarding the delay by the Philippine Statistics Authority (PSA) in endorsing the cancellation of businessman Joseph Sy's birth certificate. During th...

item.title: Ibiyeomie Shares How He Prayed for Wike and Other Rivers State Governors
item.description: Pastor David Ibiyeomie, wey be founder of Salvation Ministries, don share wetin happen during some serious political moments for Rivers State. E talk say former governor and now FCT Minister, Nyesom W...

item.title: Family of Kisumu Photographer Joe Miles Mourn His Brutal Death, Seek Justice
item.description: The family of Joseph Owino Jonny, popularly known as Joe Miles, a freelance photographer and videographer from Nyakach, Kisumu County, is in deep mourning after he was brutally killed. On March 3, Joe...

item.title: Indian Embassy Advises Citizens in Iran to Coordinate Before Using Land Borders
item.description: The Indian Embassy in Tehran has issued a cautionary advisory for Indian nationals residing in Iran. Citizens have been advised not to approach any of Iran's land borders for travel without prior coor...

item.title: Mother forced to travel 90 miles for specialised postpartum mental health care
item.description: A 30-year-old mother from York, Lizzy Berryman, has highlighted the critical shortage of mother and baby units (MBUs) in Yorkshire after she was compelled to travel 90 miles to Derby for emergency car...

item.title: Imelda Schweighart to Represent Mothers in Miss Universe Philippines 2026
item.description: Imelda Schweighart, hailing from Kalibo, Aklan, is set to represent mothers in the upcoming Miss Universe Philippines 2026 pageant. Known for her previous participation in beauty competitions and her ...

item.title: Investigation Underway After Roodepoort Schoolgirl Assaulted in Scholar Transport
item.description: The Greater Gauteng Learner Transport Organisation (GGLTO) is investigating a disturbing incident involving a schoolgirl being assaulted inside a minibus taxi in Roodepoort. A video widely circulated ...

item.title: Sindh schools to close on March 11 for Youm-i-Ali observance
item.description: The Sindh government has announced that all public and private schools under its administration will remain closed on Wednesday, March 11, 2026, in observance of Youm-i-Ali. The notification was issue...

item.title: The Life and Legacy of Atila Altaunbay, Grace Jones’ Former Husband
item.description: Atila Altaunbay, born in Turkey in 1976, spent much of his youth in Belgium. He initially worked as a pizza delivery boy before becoming a professional bodyguard. His life took a major turn when he me...

item.title: Court allows Charity Gethi to retain car in NYS asset recovery case

item.title: Sheikh Gumi Says He Will Support Armed Groups Including IPOB, Boko Haram and Bandits If They Renounce Violence and Engage in Dialogue
